title: Product Ad Poster AI

imagePrompts.prompt: Theme: Vertical 3:4 giant-typography product launch poster for fixed brand name detail fixed product name detail, built around fixed product type detail. Subject: fictional running shoe as crisp hero product with runner in motion supplies the swappable hero subject detail for this template. fixed product name detail is the crisp hero product for fixed brand name detail, with realistic material, complete structure, readable silhouette, and clear product scale. fixed person type detail supports the brand mood without stealing focus. Scene: fixed scene mood detail forms a premium campaign environment linked to the product category. Composition: Fixed product-launch poster system: oversized bold sans-serif fixed headline text detail becomes the spatial structure, with product, model or usage scene, perspective depth, contact shadows, and foreground/background occlusion integrated into one believable space. Signature Elements: fixed selling points detail appear as 3-5 compact product feature labels near the hero product while the giant title acts as wall, track, tunnel, terrain, sound-wave rail, scent-space, or brand symbol. Style: High-end commercial campaign poster with giant perspective typography, strong layout design, polished product-release energy, realistic materials, unified lighting, sharp detail, and complete information hierarchy. Color Palette: Fixed controlled premium palette chosen around the product concept, with one main color, supporting neutral, small accent color, and polished campaign-grade saturation. Lighting: Unified commercial light, crisp product edges, realistic reflections, atmospheric depth, and sharp material readability. Typography: FLOW / Move in color supplies the swappable visible text elements detail for this template. vertical 3:4 poster, huge word FLOW behind the product, blue and lime color system provides the visible environment while the fixed composition and visual style remain intact. Top-left brand text "fixed brand name detail", hero headline "fixed headline text detail", product name "fixed product name detail", subtitle "fixed subtitle text detail", campaign micro typography, small labels for fixed selling points detail, product code, date, fine dividers, and decorative barcode-like marks. Restrictions: Single vertical 3:4 campaign poster, source-appropriate brand presentation, clear brand/product/headline text, coherent perspective, complete information system, sharp product detail, polished premium advertising finish.
